title: platanthera neottianthoides
intro: Platanthera neottianthoides, also known as the Prairie Fringed Orchid, is a perennial plant species native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help to soothe and heal wounds. The Prairie Fringed Orchid is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and promoting relaxation, likely due to its flavonoid and phenolic content. Herbal preparations of Platanthera neottianthoides can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and salves, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
